name: tension_theme
description: Tense, slightly dramatic music for rescue and danger moments. Builds urgency without being scary.

sources.title: Agressive Phonk Music (Hard Phonk Mix)
sources.author: Tunetank
sources.notes: Energetic, restless, driving. Duration ~1:38. Good for chase/tension.

sources.title: Funny Chase Music
sources.author: Pixabay Funk
sources.notes: Spy/funk chase. Duration varies. Search 'funny chase' on Pixabay for more.

mixing_notes.ducking: reduce by 2-4 dB during critical dialogue
